nasb.text: A faithful man will abound with blessings, But he who makes haste to be rich will not go unpunished.

esv.text: A faithful man will abound with blessings, but whoever hastens to be rich will not go unpunished.

cnv.text: 忠實的人必有大福； 急於發財的，不免受罰。

ccb.text: 忠信的人必大蒙祝福， 急于发财的难免受罚。

csbs.text: 忠实的人，大蒙祝福； 急于发财的，难逃罪责。
